ogTitle: Anglers Rest vs Annuello: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Anglers Rest and Annuello.
heading: Anglers Rest vs Annuello — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Anglers Rest, Victoria and Annuello, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Annuello has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Anglers Rest (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Anglers Rest or Annuello safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Anglers Rest has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Annuello scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Anglers Rest scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Annuello scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Anglers Rest or Annuello?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Annuello has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
